title: No Three-Bolt Overlay
description: Removes the annoying overlay when using the Three-Bolt Helmet from Aquamirae
body:
Simply removes the obtrusive overlay when using the Three-Bolt Helmet from the [Aquamirae](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquamirae) mod. If you're using the Forge version of the mod, then this isn't necessary since you can easily toggle the overlay in the config. If you're using the Fabric version though, this is the only way to disable the overlay.

**Before:**
![With overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3a4be8bb9b9a90a9a714f4a91e3fcdbe8f4948b.png)
**After:**
![Without overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5d3a802f424dd0cdd511dd14a93622e1947a484.png)

**Requires [Aquamirae](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquamirae)** (obv)
